title: How much should I spend to buy my first car as a 25-year-old? I aksed ChatGPT to do the math
summary: At 25 and earning ₹60,000 a month, prioritize financial security when buying your first car. Aim for a price within ₹6–8 lakh and a loan of ₹4–5 lakh over 4–5 years. Maintain savings and consider prepayment as your income rises to save on interest.

title: FPI vs FDI Explained: What’s the difference and why do they impact India’s financial markets differently?
summary: Foreign Portfolio Investments (FPIs) and Foreign Direct Investments (FDIs) differ in ownership and strategy. FPIs are short-term, focusing on financial assets, while FDIs involve long-term commitments to physical assets.&nbsp;

title: Dearness Allowance: Himachal Pradesh to pay full salary, DA and HRA of employees during study leave for higher education
summary: The Himachal Pradesh government, led by Chief Minister Thakur Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu, on Thursday announced that state employees will now receive 100 per cent of their salary while on study leave for higher education.

summary: Discussions on the 8th Pay Commission have sparked interest, as NC-JCM proposes new advances for salary revisions. Key proposals include a vehicle advance of up to ₹10 lakh and restoring the Natural Calamity Advance

title: ‘Happy to be invested’: Retail investors snap up SpaceX shares on first trading day after company allots 20% for segment
summary: SpaceX allocated a record 20% of its IPO shares for retail investors, driving strong first-day trading. Experts felt that retail buying was what pushed SpaceX shares 19% on their first day of trading.&nbsp;

title: Earning FD interest? Why you should submit Form 121 — TDS provisions explained
summary: A bank deducts 10% TDS if the interest payable on a customer’s fixed deposit exceeds ₹50,000 ( ₹1 lakh for senior citizens) in a financial year. A customer must submit Form 121 to avail a TDS exemption. However, interest must still be declared at the time of filing the ITR.

title: SpaceX surges past $2 trillion in Nasdaq debut: How much your ₹5 lakh investment could be worth by 2030
summary: SpaceX's IPO valued the company at $2 trillion, making it the sixth-largest U.S. company and turning Elon Musk into the first trillionaire. Investors are optimistic about its potential but face volatility as SpaceX is unprofitable with a price-to-revenue ratio of 112.

title: Ashish Kacholia's picks: 12 stocks rally up to 130% in CY26, 3 turned multibaggers; 2 new Q4 bets
summary: Ashish Kacholia's disclosed portfolio value rose 18% to around Rs 3,070 crore in the March 2026 quarter. While over half his holdings declined this year, several stocks delivered strong gains, including three multibaggers. He also added two new stocks.

title: Concurrent Gainers: 11 stocks gain for 5 straight sessions, rally up to 20%
summary: Eleven stocks with market capitalisations above Rs 1,000 crore rose in each of the five trading sessions ending June 12, outperforming the broader market and delivering gains of up to 20%.

title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as falling oil prices and US-Iran peace hopes lift risk sentiment
summary: Bitcoin hovered near $64,000, buoyed by falling oil prices and optimism for a US-Iran peace deal, which lifted overall risk sentiment. While Bitcoin saw a slight gain, Ethereum experienced a minor dip. Major altcoins showed mixed performance, with some falling and others rising.

title: Uday Kotak questions SpaceX valuation, says only time will tell if we're in ‘mega bubble'
summary: Uday Kotak described SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO as a test for capitalism, questioning whether investors are backing humanity’s future or fueling a massive bubble. His remarks came after the company’s debut propelled Elon Musk to trillionaire status and lifted SpaceX into the world’s corporate elite.

title: What crypto investors need to know for tax season 2026
summary: India's tax season now demands greater scrutiny for crypto investors as enforcement intensifies. summary: Facing renewed external sector pressures, the RBI has revived a version of the FCNR(B) deposit framework to attract foreign currency inflows and support the rupee. title: ETMarkets Smart Talk| RBI's FPI reforms could attract $50-100 billion into Indian debt over time: Vikas Garg of Invesco MF
summary: RBI’s easing of foreign investment norms for government securities could attract substantial long-term capital inflows into India’s debt market, according to Invesco Mutual Fund. The reforms may deepen bond markets, support the rupee, improve liquidity and strengthen macroeconomic stability.

title: SpaceX becomes world's 7th most valuable company after blockbuster market debut
summary: SpaceX’s record-breaking IPO debut lifted its valuation above $2 trillion, making it one of the world’s most valuable companies. Strong investor demand, heavy trading volumes and retail enthusiasm boosted Elon Musk’s fortune, despite the company remaining loss-making and heavily growth-driven.

title: ET Alpha Wealth Summit | From private credit to real estate funds, alternate investments are no longer a niche play for HNIs: Lakshmi Iyer

title: Mind Over Money | Long walks are my meditation; they help me think beyond market noise: Citi's Mickey Bhatia
summary: Citi executive Mickey Bhatia credits long walks, early mornings, reading and consistent routines for maintaining mental resilience during volatile market periods.
